********************************
HOW TO CATCH THE LOCAL FAVORITES
********************************

The most popular Surprise Bags are popular for a reason. If you
haven't been able to grab one yet, worry not. We'll share our
best tips with you.

***************************************
THREE TIPS TO SNAG THOSE TOP-RATED BAGS
***************************************

1. Favorite your top spots: Tap the ❤️ icon on the stores you
love. You’ll find them instantly under your "Favorites" tab.

2. Get notified: Never miss another Surprise Bag. Go to
Favorites and tap 🔔 to get a push notification when your
favourite bag is available.

3. Be quick: If you see a high-rated bag available, don’t
hesitate. Chances are, someone else is looking at that exact same
bag, getting ready to tap the Reserve button.

GET YOUR 5 ⭐ BAG
